info.title: Stewardess MCP Service
info.description: Local source-code repository tools for AI agents. Provides file reading, search, editing, git, and command execution.

get.summary: Returns the full capability manifest including all tool schemas.
get.description: Returns the full capability manifest including all tool schemas.

get.summary: Lists the commands that are currently permitted by configuration.
get.description: Lists the commands that are currently permitted by configuration.

post.summary: Runs the configured build command (e.g. dotnet build or msbuild).
post.description: Runs the configured build command (e.g. dotnet build or msbuild).

post.summary: Runs the configured test command (e.g. dotnet test).
post.description: Runs the configured test command (e.g. dotnet test).

post.summary: Runs a custom command that must appear in the AllowedCommands whitelist.
post.description: Runs a custom command that must appear in the AllowedCommands whitelist.

post.summary: Overwrites (or creates) a file with the supplied content.
post.description: Overwrites (or creates) a file with the supplied content.

post.summary: Creates a new file; optionally fails if the file already exists.
post.description: Creates a new file; optionally fails if the file already exists.

post.summary: Creates a directory (with optional parent creation).
post.description: Creates a directory (with optional parent creation).

post.summary:
Deletes a single file. A backup is created (and a rollback token returned)
unless options.createBackup is false.
When ApprovalRequiredForDestructive is enabled an approval token is required.
post.description:
Deletes a single file. A backup is created (and a rollback token returned)
unless options.createBackup is false.
When ApprovalRequiredForDestructive is enabled an approval token is required.

post.summary: Deletes a directory. Requires recursive=true for non-empty directories.
post.description: Deletes a directory. Requires recursive=true for non-empty directories.

post.summary: Appends content to the end of an existing file.
post.description: Appends content to the end of an existing file.

post.summary: Replaces occurrences of a literal string within a file.
post.description: Replaces occurrences of a literal string within a file.

post.summary: Replaces a range of lines in a file with new content.
post.description: Replaces a range of lines in a file with new content.

post.summary: Applies a unified diff patch to a single file.
post.description: Applies a unified diff patch to a single file.

get.summary: Reads the full (or partial) content of a file.
get.description: Reads the full (or partial) content of a file.

get.summary: Reads a contiguous range of lines from a file.
get.description: Reads a contiguous range of lines from a file.

post.summary: Reads several files in a single POST call.
post.description: Reads several files in a single POST call.

get.summary: Returns a best-effort structural summary of a code file.
get.description: Returns a best-effort structural summary of a code file.

get.summary: Returns whether the repository root is a valid git repository.
get.description: Returns whether the repository root is a valid git repository.

get.summary:
Returns the current git status of the repository.
Optionally restrict to a sub-path via ?path=src/MyLib.
get.description:
Returns the current git status of the repository.
Optionally restrict to a sub-path via ?path=src/MyLib.

post.summary: Returns the unified diff for working-tree or staged changes.
post.description: Returns the unified diff for working-tree or staged changes.

get.summary:
Returns the unified diff for a single file.
Query params: path (required), scope (default: "unstaged").
get.description:
Returns the unified diff for a single file.
Query params: path (required), scope (default: "unstaged").

get.summary:
Returns the full details of a single commit, including metadata, changed files,
and optionally the diff patch.
Query params: includeDiff (default: true).
get.description:
Returns the full details of a single commit, including metadata, changed files,
and optionally the diff patch.
Query params: includeDiff (default: true).

post.summary: Returns the commit history for the repository or a sub-path.
post.description: Returns the commit history for the repository or a sub-path.

get.summary: Basic liveness probe. Always returns 200 OK.  No authentication required.
get.description: Basic liveness probe. Always returns 200 OK.  No authentication required.

get.summary: Returns high-level repository information and active policy.
get.description: Returns high-level repository information and active policy.

get.summary: Lists the immediate contents of a directory.
get.description: Lists the immediate contents of a directory.

get.summary: Checks whether a path exists inside the repository.
get.description: Checks whether a path exists inside the repository.

get.summary: Returns detailed metadata for a file or directory.
get.description: Returns detailed metadata for a file or directory.

get.summary: Returns solution / project info discovered in the repository.
get.description: Returns solution / project info discovered in the repository.

post.summary: Searches for a literal string (POST variant for full options).
post.description: Searches for a literal string (POST variant for full options).

post.summary: Searches using a .NET regular expression pattern.
post.description: Searches using a .NET regular expression pattern.

get.summary: Finds files whose names match a wildcard or substring.
get.description: Finds files whose names match a wildcard or substring.

post.summary: Best-effort symbol search via text heuristics.
post.description: Best-effort symbol search via text heuristics.

post.summary: Finds textual references to an identifier across the repository.
post.description: Finds textual references to an identifier across the repository.

RunBuildRequest.description: Request to run the repository's build command.

workingDirectory.description:
Working directory relative to repository root.  Empty = root.
Typically the directory containing a .sln or .csproj file.

buildCommand.description:
Build tool to use: "dotnet build", "msbuild", or another allowed command.
Defaults to "dotnet build".

arguments.description: Additional CLI arguments appended to the build command.

timeoutSeconds.description: Override the server's timeout (seconds); capped at MaxCommandExecutionSeconds.

RunTestsRequest.description: Request to run the repository's test suite.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory relative to repository root. Empty = root.

testCommand.description: Test command: "dotnet test" (default) or another allowed command.

arguments.description: Extra arguments appended to the test command.

filter.description: Filter expression passed to the test runner (e.g. dotnet test --filter).

configuration.description: Build configuration to use, e.g. "Debug" or "Release".

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional override for the maximum allowed execution time in seconds.

RunCustomCommandRequest.description: Request to execute a custom command from the server's AllowedCommands whitelist.

command.description: The full command line to execute.  Must start with an entry in AllowedCommands.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory relative to repository root.  Empty = root.

timeoutSeconds.description: Optional override for the maximum allowed execution time in seconds.

WriteFileRequest.description: Overwrites (or creates) a file with new content.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

content.description: New full content of the file.

encoding.description:
Encoding to use when writing.  Supported values: "utf-8", "utf-8-bom",
"utf-16", "ascii".  Defaults to "utf-8".

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

EditOptions.description: Common options applied to every mutating operation.

dryRun.description:
When true, the operation is simulated and no files are changed.
The response contains the full proposed diff.

createBackup.description:
When true (default), a backup copy is created before overwriting.
The backup path is returned in {StewardessMCPService.Models.EditResult.BackupPath}.

changeReason.description: Optional agent-supplied reason for the change, recorded in the audit log.

sessionId.description: Agent-level session/correlation identifier for grouping related operations.

CreateFileRequest.description: Creates a new file. Fails if the file already exists unless Overwrite is true.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

content.description: Initial content of the new file.

encoding.description: Encoding to use when writing the file (e.g. "utf-8").

overwrite.description: When true, overwrites an existing file.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

CreateDirectoryRequest.description: Creates a new directory at the given path.

path.description: Directory path relative to repository root.

createParents.description: When true, creates all missing parent directories.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

RenamePathRequest.description: Renames a file or directory within its current parent directory.

path.description: Path of the file or directory to rename, relative to repository root.

newName.description: New name only (not a full path). To move to another directory use move_path.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

MovePathRequest.description: Moves a file or directory to a new location within the repository.

sourcePath.description: Source path relative to repository root.

destinationPath.description: Destination path relative to repository root.

overwrite.description: When true, overwrites an existing path at the destination.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

DeleteFileRequest.description: Deletes a single file within the repository.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

approvalToken.description:
Confirmation token returned by a prior preview_changes call.
Required when ApprovalRequiredForDestructive is enabled.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

path.description: Directory path relative to repository root.

recursive.description: When false (default), deletion fails if the directory is non-empty.

approvalToken.description: Approval token required when ApprovalRequiredForDestructive is enabled.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

AppendFileRequest.description: Appends content to the end of an existing file.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

ensureNewLine.description: When true, ensures the content starts on a new line.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

ReplaceTextRequest.description: Replaces all occurrences of a literal string within a file.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

ignoreCase.description: When true, performs a case-insensitive search.

maxReplacements.description: When > 0, limits the number of replacements made.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

ReplaceLinesRequest.description: Replaces a range of lines in a file with new content.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

PatchFileRequest.description: Applies a unified diff patch to a single file.

path.description: File path relative to repository root.

patch.description: Unified diff text (--- a/ +++ b/ format).

fuzzFactor.description: Number of context lines for fuzzy matching (default 3).

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

ApplyDiffRequest.description: Applies a multi-file unified diff in one operation.

diff.description: Full unified diff text that may span multiple files.

fuzzFactor.description: Number of context lines for fuzzy matching (default 3).

options.description: Write options such as dry-run mode and backup control.

BatchEditRequest.description: Executes multiple edit operations atomically (all succeed or all roll back).

edits.description: The ordered list of individual edit operations to apply.

dryRun.description: When true, all edits are dry-run and nothing is written.

changeReason.description: Free-text description of why this batch of changes is being made.

BatchEditItem.description: A single edit operation within a batch request.

path.description: Target file path relative to repository root.

oldText.description: Text to find for replace_text operations.

patch.description: Unified diff text for patch_file operations.

ignoreCase.description: When true, performs case-insensitive matching for replace_text operations.

PreviewChangesRequest.description: Request to preview proposed changes before applying them.

paths.description: List of files to preview changes for.

proposedEdits.description: The intended edit operations (as a BatchEditRequest with DryRun=true).

RollbackRequest.description: Request to roll back a prior edit using its rollback token.

rollbackToken.description: Token returned by a prior edit operation's {StewardessMCPService.Models.EditResult.RollbackToken}.

ReadMultipleFilesRequest.description: Request to read multiple files in a single call.

paths.description: List of relative paths to read.

maxBytesPerFile.description: Per-file byte limit; null uses the global MaxFileReadBytes setting.

GitDiffRequest.description: Request to retrieve a git diff.

path.description: Restrict diff to this file or directory.  Empty = whole repo.

contextLines.description: Number of context lines around each change (default 3).

GitLogRequest.description: Request to retrieve the commit log.

path.description: Restrict log to commits that touch this path (empty = all).

maxCount.description: Maximum number of commits to return (default 20).

ref.description: Branch or commit ref to start from; empty = HEAD.

author.description: Restrict to commits by this author name or email.

since.description: ISO-8601 date; return only commits after this date.

until.description: ISO-8601 date; return only commits before this date.

SearchTextRequest.description: Request to search for literal text across repository files.

searchPath.description: Restrict search to this subdirectory (relative path; empty = whole repo).

extensions.description: Restrict to these file extensions (e.g. ".cs", ".json").  Empty = all.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return.  Capped at server limit.

sortByPath.description: When true, results are sorted by file path.

contextLinesBefore.description: Number of context lines to include before each match.

contextLinesAfter.description: Number of context lines to include after each match.

SearchRegexRequest.description: Request to search repository files using a .NET regular expression.

multiline.description: Apply the pattern in multiline mode (^ and $ match line boundaries).

searchPath.description: Restrict search to this subdirectory (relative path; empty = whole repo).

extensions.description: Restrict to these file extensions (e.g. ".cs", ".json").  Empty = all.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return.  Capped at server limit.

sortByPath.description: When true, results are sorted by file path.

contextLinesBefore.description: Number of context lines to include before each match.

contextLinesAfter.description: Number of context lines to include after each match.

SearchByExtensionRequest.description: Request to find all files with specified extensions.

extensions.description: Extensions to find (include the leading dot, e.g. ".cs").

searchPath.description: Sub-directory to search in; empty = repository root.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return.

SearchSymbolRequest.description:
Best-effort symbol search using text heuristics.
Finds class names, method signatures, interface names, etc.

symbolName.description: Symbol name or partial name to search for.

ignoreCase.description: When true, performs a case-insensitive name comparison.

searchPath.description: Restrict search to this subdirectory (relative path; empty = whole repo).

extensions.description: Restrict to these file extensions (e.g. ".cs", ".json").  Empty = all.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return.  Capped at server limit.

sortByPath.description: When true, results are sorted by file path.

contextLinesBefore.description: Number of context lines to include before each match.

contextLinesAfter.description: Number of context lines to include after each match.

FindReferencesRequest.description: Request to find textual usages of an identifier across the repository.

identifierName.description: Identifier name whose usages (textual references) should be found.

ignoreCase.description: When true, performs a case-insensitive comparison.

searchPath.description: Restrict search to this subdirectory (relative path; empty = whole repo).

extensions.description: Restrict to these file extensions (e.g. ".cs", ".json").  Empty = all.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of results to return.  Capped at server limit.

sortByPath.description: When true, results are sorted by file path.

contextLinesBefore.description: Number of context lines to include before each match.

contextLinesAfter.description: Number of context lines to include after each match.
